mnemonics.title: PHDG - Four Clustering Types
mnemonics.content: Partitional (K-Means), Hierarchical (Agglomerative), Density-based (DBSCAN), Grid-based (STING) - four main categories.

mnemonics.title: K-Means vs DBSCAN
mnemonics.content: K-Means: needs K, spherical clusters, sensitive to outliers. DBSCAN: finds K automatically, any shape, ignores outliers.

mnemonics.title: Silhouette = Separation Score
mnemonics.content: Close to +1: well clustered. Close to 0: on boundary. Close to -1: probably in wrong cluster.

mnemonics.title: Elbow = Bend
mnemonics.content: Plot WCSS vs K. Where the curve bends (elbow), that is the optimal K. After the elbow, adding more clusters gives diminishing returns.

mnemonics.title: DBI = Lower is Better
mnemonics.content: Davies-Bouldin Index: Lower = better (compact, separated clusters). Opposite of Silhouette Score direction.
